chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 453 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of MA 3755/24 24-03-2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G. **** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which shows that the applicant and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding of this application. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
